blocks.text: Glimt conquered San Siro — now Norway wants the whole Champions League
Tuesday's 2-1 at Inter added 200,000 followers overnight. The CL draw looms and Glimt's own star warns rivals: nobody wants to face us. Norwegian football has never stood taller.
🎿 Fri 16:10 — Biathlon Men's 20km Individual (Kontiolahti): Bø and Lægreid hunting big points
